title: lindsaea repens var. sessilis
intro: Lindsaea repens var. sessilis, also known as creeping lindsaea, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Lindsaea repens var. sessilis include its potential to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
